scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/schemas/repository/v1 dist/schemas/repository/v2 dist/schemas/semantic/v1 dist/schemas/ci/v1 dist/schemas/hosted/v1 dist/schemas/integration/v1 dist/schemas/dag/v2 dist/schemas/recovery/v1 && cp ../../contracts/repository/v1/*.json dist/schemas/repository/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/repository/v2/*.json dist/schemas/repository/v2/ && cp ../../contracts/semantic/v1/*.json dist/schemas/semantic/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/ci/v1/*.json dist/schemas/ci/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/hosted/v1/*.json dist/schemas/hosted/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/integration/v1/*.json dist/schemas/integration/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/dag/v2/*.json dist/schemas/dag/v2/ && cp ../../contracts/recovery/v1/*.json dist/schemas/recovery/v1/
